mapper.insert:
insert into store_goods_order
order_id, merchant_id, dept_id, code, price, sorting_price, source, print_status, odo_print_status, pay_status, status, comment, delivery_date, receive_date, warehouse_id, creator_id, financial_audit_status, create_time, last_modify_time
#{orderId}, #{merchantId}, #{deptId}, #{code}, #{price}, #{sortingPrice}, #{source}, #{printStatus}, #{odoPrintStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{status}, #{comment}, #{deliveryDate}, #{receiveDate}, #{warehouseId}, #{creatorId}, #{financialAuditStatus},
now(),now()
mapper.update: update store_goods_order set status=0,last_modify_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} AND status not in(3,4)

update store_goods_order set financial_audit_status=1,pay_status=0,last_modify_time = now() where order_id in
#{orderId}

update store_goods_order set financial_audit_status=0,pay_status=0,last_modify_time = now() where pay_status = '0' AND order_id in
#{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT sgo.merchant_id ,sm.nickname as merchantName FROM store_goods_order sgo left join store_member sm on sgo.merchant_id = sm.id where sgo.status != '0'
AND sgo.dept_id IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE find_in_set( #{loginUserDeptId}, ancestors ) or dept_id=#{loginUserDeptId} )
GROUP BY sgo.merchant_id ,sm.nickname

SELECT sdr.route_id ,sdr.route_name FROM store_deliver_route sdr join store_route_shop srs on sdr.route_id = srs.route_id join store_goods_order sgo on srs.customer_id = sgo.merchant_id where sgo.status != '0'
AND sdr.dept_id IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE find_in_set( #{loginUserDeptId}, ancestors ) or dept_id=#{loginUserDeptId} )
GROUP BY sdr.route_id ,sdr.route_name

SELECT sgq.quotation_id ,sgq.quotation_name FROM store_goods_quotation sgq join store_goods_quotation_goods sgqg on sgq.quotation_id = sgqg.quotation_id join store_goods_order_item sgoi on sgqg.goods_id = sgoi.goods_id where 1=1
AND sgq.dept_id IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE find_in_set( #{loginUserDeptId}, ancestors ) or dept_id=#{loginUserDeptId} )
GROUP BY sgq.quotation_id ,sgq.quotation_name
mapper.update:
update store_goods_order set status=old_status,last_modify_time = now() where order_id in
#{orderId}

update store_goods_order set old_status=status,last_modify_time = now() where order_id in
#{orderId}

update store_goods_order set financial_audit_status=#{financialAuditStatus}, syn_status=#{synStatus}, receipt_status=#{receiptStatus},last_modify_time = now() where order_id in
#{orderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT count( t2.goods_id ) FROM store_goods_order t1, store_goods_order_item t2 WHERE t1.order_id = t2.order_id AND t1.status != '0' AND t2.goods_id IN
#{goodsId}
mapper.update:
update store_goods_order set print_status='1' where order_id in
#{orderId}

update store_goods_order set odo_print_status='1' where order_id in
#{orderId}
mapper.select: select base.*,sm.opmanager_id as opmanagerId from (select t.* from store_goods_order t where t.pay_status = '0' and t.status in ('4','5') GROUP BY t.merchant_id ,t.delivery_date asc) as base left join store_member sm on base.merchant_id = sm.id group by base.merchant_id
